packageRules.description: Hold astro <6.4 until @astrojs/starlight + @astrojs/mdx support it. astro 6.4.0 removed the astro/jsx/rehype.js export that @astrojs/mdx 5.0.6 (transitive via starlight) imports, breaking the Deploy Docs CD build.
Hold pnpm <11. pnpm 11 makes ERR_PNPM_IGNORED_BUILDS (esbuild/sharp) fatal, breaking 'pnpm install --frozen-lockfile' in the docs Deploy Docs CD job.

Hold @astrojs/starlight <0.40 to match the astro <6.4 hold. starlight 0.41 pulls @astrojs/mdx@7 which needs astro 7 (chunkToString export), breaking the Deploy Docs build against astro 6.4.x. Unfreeze together with astro in one coordinated astro-7 upgrade.
Pin GitHub Actions to SHA for security

Block astro major bumps for docs/**. astro 7 breaks the Docs Astro build because @astrojs/mdx (pulled in transitively via starlight) is not yet compatible: "Package subpath './jsx/rehype.js' is not defined by 'exports'". An astro major needs a coordinated @astrojs/* bump, not a single-package one.
